trans-unit.source: Creating dump file '{0}'
trans-unit.target: Criando arquivo de despejo ''{0}''

trans-unit.source: Dumping process {0} - {1}
trans-unit.target: Fazendo o despejo do processo {0} – {1}
trans-unit.note: 0 is pid, 1 is the name of the process

trans-unit.source: Dumping this process tree (from bottom):
trans-unit.target: Despejar esta árvore de processo (da parte inferior):

trans-unit.source: Error getting parent of process {0} - {1}: {2}"
trans-unit.target: Erro ao obter o pai do processo {0} – {1}: {2}"
trans-unit.note: 0 is pid, 1 is name, 2 is the exception

trans-unit.source: Error while killing process {0} - {1}: {2}
trans-unit.target: Erro ao eliminar o processo {0} – {1}: {2}
trans-unit.note: 0 is pid, 1 is name, 2 is the exception

trans-unit.source: Error while taking dump of process {0} - {1}: {2}
trans-unit.target: Erro ao fazer o despejo do processo {0} – {1}: {2}
trans-unit.note: 0 is pid, 1 is name, 2 is the exception from the system

trans-unit.source: The hang dump file
trans-unit.target: O arquivo de despejo de travamento

trans-unit.source: Hang dump file
trans-unit.target: Arquivo de despejo de travamento

trans-unit.source: Environment variable '{0}' is set to '{1}' instead of '{2}'
trans-unit.target: A variável de ambiente ''{0}'' ambiente está definida como ''{1}'' em vez de ''{2}''

trans-unit.source: Environment variable '{0}' is not set
trans-unit.target: A variável de ambiente ''{0}'' não está definida

trans-unit.source: Produce hang dump files when a test execution exceed a given time.
trans-unit.target: Produzir arquivos de despejo de travamento quando uma execução de teste exceder um determinado tempo.

trans-unit.source: Hang dump
trans-unit.target: Despejo de travamento

trans-unit.note: {0} - the exception that occurred. {1} - disk info detailing free space

trans-unit.source: Specify the name of the dump file. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {time} (timestamp). The legacy %p token (process ID) is also supported for backward compatibility.
trans-unit.target: Specify the name of the dump file. Supports the following placeholders: {pname} (test application name), {pid} (process ID), {asm} (entry assembly name), {tfm} (target framework moniker), {time} (timestamp). The legacy %p token (process ID) is also supported for backward compatibility.

trans-unit.source: Generate a dump file if the test process hangs
trans-unit.target: Gerar um arquivo de despejo se o processo de teste travar

trans-unit.source: Hang dump timeout of '{0}' expired
trans-unit.target: Tempo limite de despejo de travamento de ''{0}'' expirado

trans-unit.source: Specify the timeout after which the dump will be generated. The timeout value is specified in one of the following formats: 500ms, 500mil, 500millisecond, 500milliseconds, 5400s, 5400sec, 5400second, 5400seconds, 90m, 90min, 90minute, 90minutes, 1.5h, 1.5hour, 1.5hours, 1d, 1day, 1days. A bare number (with no suffix) is interpreted as milliseconds. Default is 30m.
trans-unit.target: Specify the timeout after which the dump will be generated. The timeout value is specified in one of the following formats: 500ms, 500mil, 500millisecond, 500milliseconds, 5400s, 5400sec, 5400second, 5400seconds, 90m, 90min, 90minute, 90minutes, 1.5h, 1.5hour, 1.5hours, 1d, 1day, 1days. A bare number (with no suffix) is interpreted as milliseconds. Default is 30m.

trans-unit.source: '--hangdump-timeout' expects a single timeout argument
trans-unit.target: ''--hangdump-timeout'' espera um único argumento de tempo limite

trans-unit.source: Specify the type of the dump. Valid values are {0}. Default type is 'Full'
trans-unit.target: Specify the type of the dump. Valid values are {0}. Default type is 'Full'

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not a valid dump type. Valid options are {1}
trans-unit.target: '{0}' is not a valid dump type. Valid options are {1}

trans-unit.source: Request of type '{0}' is not supported
trans-unit.target: Não há suporte para a solicitação do tipo ''{0}''

trans-unit.source: The list of tests that were running at the time of the hang
trans-unit.target: A lista de testes que estavam sendo executados no momento do travamento

trans-unit.source: Hang test list
trans-unit.target: Lista de testes de travamento

trans-unit.source: You specified one or more hang dump parameters but did not enable it, add --hangdump to the command line
trans-unit.target: Você especificou um ou mais parâmetros de hang dump, mas não os ativou, adicione --hangdump à linha de comando

trans-unit.source: The following tests were still running when dump was taken (format: [<time-elapsed-since-start>] <name>):
trans-unit.target: Os testes a seguir ainda estavam em execução quando o despejo foi realizado (formato: [<time-elapsed-since-start>] <name>):
